chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6200 of 2024 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.3665/2025. 2. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 25.02.2025 Syed Ansar Hussain Zaidi, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Mohamed Vawda, advocate for the respondents 4 to 14 This petition essentially seeks implementation of some order passed in civil suit. The petition is prima facie mis-conceived, frivolous and appears to be an abuse of process of law. In view hereof, petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
